reason: Tweet contains explicit support for Islamic State ideology, uses ISIS-associated hashtags, and promotes uncompromising militant jihad. The text translates to 'The Islamic State does not negotiate! No dialogue! No compromise! But steadfastness until death.. and jihad until martyrdom'
